---
title: "Getting Started with week2pkg"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with week2pkg}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

`week2pkg` provides lightweight helpers for common Week 2-style numeric vector
operations: summary statistics and z-score standardization.

## Summarize numeric data

```{r}
library(week2pkg)

x <- c(4, 6, 8, 10, 12)
summarize_numeric(x)
```

## Compute z-scores

```{r}
zscore_numeric(x)
```

These helpers are intentionally minimal and designed to be easy to read,
re-use, and test.
